title: lomatium plummerae subsp. sonnei
intro: Lomatium plummerae subsp. sonnei, also known as Sonne's Lomatium or Sonne's Lomatium parryi, is a type of flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lomatium plummerae subsp. sonnei include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Lomatium plummerae subsp. sonnei is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
